prompt_text:
### Demographics: 74-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Fibrosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Fibrosis; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Liraglutide 1.8mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 88.1 kg; Height 184.3 cm; BMI 25.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 142/78 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.6%; 9 months ago 7.4%; 6 months ago 7.5%; 3 months ago 7.1%; current 7.0%), FPG (12 months ago 154mg/dL; 9 months ago 155mg/dL; 6 months ago 155mg/dL; 3 months ago 141mg/dL; current 169mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 88.8kg; 9 months ago 87.7kg; 6 months ago 85.3kg; 3 months ago 83.8kg; current 88.1kg), Height (12 months ago 184.3cm; 9 months ago 184.3cm; 6 months ago 184.3cm; 3 months ago 184.3cm; current 184.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 25.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 148mmHg; 9 months ago 145mmHg; 6 months ago 148mmHg; 3 months ago 142mmHg; current 142mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 80mmHg; 9 months ago 78mmHg; 6 months ago 78mmHg; 3 months ago 80mmHg; current 78mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 78U/L; 9 months ago 68U/L; 6 months ago 73U/L; 3 months ago 71U/L; current 73U/L), AST (12 months ago 90U/L; 9 months ago 87U/L; 6 months ago 83U/L; 3 months ago 89U/L; current 90U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.3mg/dL; current 1.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 32mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 32mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 30mL/min/1.73m²; current 27mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 488mg/g; 9 months ago 488mg/g; 6 months ago 372mg/g; 3 months ago 521mg/g; current 373mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 88mg/dL; 9 months ago 82mg/dL; 6 months ago 88mg/dL; 3 months ago 88mg/dL; current 86mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 50mg/dL; 9 months ago 54mg/dL; 6 months ago 51mg/dL; 3 months ago 50mg/dL; current 52mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 146mg/dL; 9 months ago 132mg/dL; 6 months ago 130mg/dL; 3 months ago 145mg/dL; current 138mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
